description_long: This ornate pagoda features a rectangular base with elaborately decorated columns and walls, adorned with intricate reliefs and traditional motifs. The structure is topped with a two-tiered, yellow-tiled roof, each tier edged with blue-gray trim and detailed eaves. The central archway serves as a grand entrance, flanked by smaller decorative windows and panels on either side. Above the main entrance, a smaller upper chamber is visible, featuring circular and rectangular windows, and capped with a decorative ridge. The roof ridges are adorned with ornamental details, and the overall color palette includes warm yellows, reds, and cool blue-grays. The pagoda's design is reminiscent of traditional East Asian architecture, likely inspired by Vietnamese or Chinese influences.
description: A richly decorated, two-tiered pagoda with yellow-tiled roofs, ornate columns, and a central arched entrance, featuring intricate reliefs and traditional East Asian motifs.
description_view_0: The pagoda is seen from a slight angle, highlighting the ornate columns, the central archway, and the detailed reliefs on the side walls.
description_view_1: A direct frontal view of the pagoda, emphasizing the symmetry of the central archway and the upper chamber with its decorative windows.
description_view_2: This view shows the opposite angle from view 0, again displaying the ornate columns and the central arch, with more emphasis on the right-side details.
description_view_3: A rear or alternate frontal view, showing the back or secondary entrance, with similar architectural features and decorative elements as the front.
